mapper.sql: sample_item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, category_code AS categoryCode, status_code AS statusCode, owner_reference AS ownerMemberNo, created_at AS createdAt

choose.when: ORDER BY item_name ASC, sample_item_id ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, sample_item_id DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ref_sample_item WHERE sample_item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sample_item_id), 90999) + 1 FROM ref_sample_item WHERE sample_item_id BETWEEN 91000 AND 91999
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ref_sample_item ( sample_item_id, sample_key, item_name, category_code, status_code, searchable_text, owner_reference, sort_order, version_no, deleted_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, CONCAT('REF-CRUD-', #{itemId}), #{itemName}, #{categoryCode}, #{statusCode}, #{categoryCode}, #{ownerMemberNo}, #{itemId}, 0, 'N', #{requestUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), #{requestUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE ref_sample_item SET item_name = #{itemName}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, searchable_text = #{categoryCode}, owner_reference = #{ownerMemberNo}, version_no = version_no + 1, updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE sample_item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE ref_sample_item SET status_code = #{statusCode}, version_no = version_no + 1, updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE sample_item_id = #{itemId}

UPDATE ref_sample_item SET deleted_yn = 'Y', status_code = 'INACTIVE', version_no = version_no + 1, updated_by = #{requestUser}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE sample_item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
